summary: Iteration 193: Verified 5 bug fixes for Appeal Case Manager. All fixes confirmed via backend API tests and frontend UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 (Translator DuplicateKeyError): VERIFIED - translate.py lines 226-238 now uses replace_one with upsert=True instead of insert_one. Backend tests confirm retry translation returns cached result without error.

Bug Fix #2 (Barrister View TOC): VERIFIED - BarristerView.jsx lines 420-428 builds tocHtml as 2-column grid from sections array. Line 579 inserts TOC after report header in export HTML. UI shows 'CONTENTS (15 SECTIONS)' with proper grid layout.

Bug Fix #3 (Quick Brief iOS fix): VERIFIED - BarristerView.jsx lines 647-665 handleQuickBrief uses axios.get with responseType:'blob' for ALL devices. Removed iOS-specific link.click() flow. Download tested successfully: Quick_Brief_Joshua_Scott_Homann.pdf
Bug Fix #4 (Acceptance Package removal): VERIFIED - No 'Acceptance Package' button found in UI. No Briefcase import in BarristerView.jsx. handleDownloadAcceptancePack function removed.

Bug Fix #5 (Word export direct download): VERIFIED - BarristerView.jsx lines 634-645 handleExportDOCX creates blob and downloads .doc file directly. Download tested successfully: Barrister_Brief_Joshua_Scott_Homann.doc
Lint Check: PASSED - Both BarristerView.jsx and translate.py pass linting with no issues. No duplicate AlertTriangle import.

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - 1 timeout due to environment)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Five bug fixes verified for iteration 193: (1) Translator now uses replace_one with upsert=True to prevent DuplicateKeyError on retry - tested with Spanish translation on report rpt_1d3ddfc9c595. (2) Barrister View TOC added to export HTML as 2-column grid. (3) Quick Brief uses axios blob download for all devices (iOS fix). (4) Acceptance Package button completely removed. (5) Word export downloads .doc directly. Test case: R v Homann (case_ba08d8e0ad0d) with Barrister Brief (rpt_1d3ddfc9c595).
